request: Add /memory-flush as workflow Phase 10.6 — between /archive (10.5) and /grant-commit (11). Conversation context is freshest at end-of-workflow, so candidate triage hits the highest signal-to-noise ratio there. Canonical memory writes ship in the same commit as the work that motivated them, and the tree is pristine at end-of-task. Touches Article IV (phase table + ordering), Article V (harness chaining), Article III.4 (downgrade the session-start nag to debt-only), src/CLAUDE.template.md + docs/init/seed.md + src/seed.template.md mirrors, .claude/skills/{harness,triage,memory-flush,commit}/, .claude/hooks/{track_guard,memory_session_start}, and the workflow.json/TaskList templates. Resolves pending-questions.md Q-001.
